docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-23-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JOSE ROSAS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE THE CORRECT DATE THAT DEFENDANT WAS SENTENCED. PER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 340.3, THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS BEGINS TO RUN FROM THE DATE JUDGMENT IS PRONOUNCED, WHICH IS THE DATE OF SENTENCING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

calendar.matters:
Defendant Jose Rosas Motion For Set Aside/Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jose Antonio Rosas, M.D., plaintiff and moving party appearing on his own behalf by telephone;
Joseph A. Motta, Esq. of Rueb & Motta, Tel. 925.602.3400, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court granted DEFENDANT JOSE ROSAS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT for reasons stated on the record. Plaintiff's counsel is to prepare a proposed order. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Defendant Jose Rosas Motion For Set Aside/Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-15-2013 Continued To Apr-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOSE ROSAS' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Appearances:
Joseph A. Motta of Rueb & Motta (925.602.3400) for plaintiff and responding party;
Jose Rosas, defendant and moving party appearing telephonically in propria persona

This matter was not argued. Mr. Motta provided the Court with the plaintiff's opposition to this motion. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: continued to April 29, 2013, at 9:30 am. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: E. Larnauti, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185 (302/MJM)

Defendant Jose Rosas Motion For Set Aside/Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-01-2013 Continued To Apr-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. GREGORY D. RUEB OF RUEB & MOTTA, TEL. NO. (925) 602-3400 EXT. 12 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
JOSE ANTONIO ROSAS, PRO PER DEFENDANT APPEARING BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - Defendant Jose Rosas' Motion For Set Aside/Vacate Judgment is continued for hearing on April 15, 2013 per agreement of parties. Opposition to be filed and served by March 6, 2013. Reply to be filed by April 8 with courtesy copy given to Dept. 302. Plaintiff's counsel was ordered to be physically present in court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JOSE ROSAS' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued on the Court's own motion to March 1, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must immediately deliver courtesy copies of its motion to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/PJB)

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 501. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Michael Rossoff, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: Amalia Salcedo and with Spanish Interpreter Jack Medina and Witness Rosina Hernandez, were all sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Jose Antonio Rosas, M.D.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows: Damages in total of $500,000.00 and costs (by decalration)
Counsel to prepare the proposed judgment and submit to court by tomorrow to Dept. 514 for signature.

Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSEPH A. MOTTA OF RUEB & MOTTA, TEL. NO. (925) 602-3400 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOSE ROSAS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend to allege the correct date that defendant was sentenced. Per Code of Civil Procedure 340.3, the statute of limitations begins to run from the date judgment is pronounced, which is the date of sentencing. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E.
